dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Frank. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Frank! How can I help you today?
I work as a machine learning researcher. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A machine learning researcher — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
I mostly work with design, testing, security. Currently working on project_F.
Got it! Sounds like you have a solid skill set.
Outside of work I enjoy gardening, baking. I also like reading about cloud computing.
Those are some great hobbies! Always good to have a healthy work-life balance.
I prefer a structured approach to work. My go-to tools are Terraform and AWS CLI.
Noted! I'll keep your structured preference in mind.
